Documentation.long_help: Compute the shortest surface (geodesic) distance from every vertex to a user-specified source vertex using Dijkstra's algorithm. The result is stored as a point data array named 'GeodesicDistance'.
Documentation.short_help: Compute geodesic distance from all vertices to a source vertex.

IntVectorProperty.name: SourceVertexId
IntVectorProperty.label: Source Vertex ID
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The vertex ID of the source point. Geodesic distances are measured from this vertex to all other vertices on the surface.
